mapper.select: SELECT p.patient_id AS patientId, p.patient_name AS patientName, CASE p.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS gender, p.age AS age, p.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, p.ward_id AS wardId, w.ward_name AS wardName, b.bed_no AS bedNo, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis FROM patient_info p LEFT JOIN sys_ward w ON p.ward_id = w.ward_id AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_bed b ON p.bed_id = b.bed_id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.patient_name = #{patientName} AND p.inpatient_no = #{inpatientNo} AND p.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT d.device_id AS deviceId, d.device_code AS deviceCode, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_type AS deviceType FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_code = #{deviceNo} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ecg_collection_record ( record_id, ecg_no, patient_id, patient_name, gender, age, inpatient_no, dept_id, dept_name, bed_no, device_id, device_name, lead_count, collection_start_time, collection_end_time, sampling_rate, ecg_data_file_url, collection_duration, collection_type, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, upload_source_file_url, record_status, ai_analysis_status, report_status, display_status, ai_conclusion_short, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{ecgNo}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{inpatientNo}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{bedNo}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceName}, #{leadCount}, #{collectionStartTime}, #{collectionEndTime}, #{samplingRate}, #{ecgDataFileUrl}, #{collectionDuration}, #{collectionType}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, #{uploadTime}, #{uploadSourceFileUrl}, #{recordStatus}, #{aiAnalysisStatus}, #{reportStatus}, #{displayStatus}, #{aiConclusionShort}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.record_id = #{ecgId} AND c.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_collection_record SET ai_analysis_status = #{aiStatus}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, display_status = #{displayStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{ecgId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(w.ward_id AS CHAR) AS value, w.ward_name AS label FROM sys_ward w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.status = 1 ORDER BY w.sort_num ASC, w.ward_id ASC

SELECT CAST(d.device_id AS CHAR) AS value, CONCAT(d.device_name, ' (', COALESCE(d.device_code, '-'), ')') AS label FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.update_time DESC, d.device_id DESC

SELECT c.record_id AS ecgId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.sampling_rate AS samplingRate, c.lead_count AS leadCount, c.ecg_data_file_url AS rawDataFileUrl, c.collection_start_time AS collectStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectEndTime FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.record_id = #{ecgId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
